title: OpenMuCF rate-ledger row
description: One microscopic muCF rate or parameter, with provenance and uncertainty. Each row of data/rates.csv must satisfy this.

unc.description: 1-sigma-style uncertainty in the same unit; 0 if not quoted.

conditions.description: Structured-ish: T, phi, hyperfine F, ortho-para, c_t, field.

single_source.description: True if it traces to one never-independently-rechecked measurement (feeds the Phase-4 cross-source audit).

needs_verification.description: True if the exact digit/locator is not yet pinned from the primary text.

distribution.description: Sampling distribution for UQ; empty = interpret value+-unc per unc_type (backward-compatible default).

dist_lo.description: Lower bound; required iff distribution in {uniform, asym_interval}, else empty.

dist_hi.description: Upper bound; required iff distribution in {uniform, asym_interval}, else empty.

recommendation.description: Recommended vs superseded within a symbol family; empty = sole value for its family.

phase.description: Typed projection of conditions: physical phase (n/a not used here; 'any' = condition-free).

target_molecule.description: Typed projection of conditions: target molecule; 'n/a' where the concept does not apply.
